name_cn:
Size 14-17-5CM
Best-selling new Petit Sac Plat series mini music score bag. Rendered with embossed soft grained calfskin, the leather features a two-tone effect. Lightweight structure with ample space, suitable for shoulder, crossbody, or hand carry.
